energy_metrics.interpretation_dof: The predicted TEP signal is concentrated in approximately 2.0 effective independent contrast(s). A value near 1.0 indicates a single-contrast system; a value near 5.0 would indicate all loops contribute equally.

contrast_knockout.description: Set Gamma_S4 = Gamma_SX = mean, recompute all loop residuals
contrast_knockout.interpretation_knockout: Removing the S4-SX Gamma contrast eliminates 99.5% of the total predicted TEP signal energy.

contrast_isolation.description: Zero all inner-cross Gamma differences, keep only S4-SX contrast
contrast_isolation.interpretation_isolation: The S4-SX contrast alone retains 72.3% of the total predicted TEP signal energy.

headline: SN Refsdal's predicted TEP signal is 100% concentrated in the S4-SX contrast (effective DOF = 2.0), confirming this is a single-contrast, single-system measurement.
